name: sidecar-display
title: Sidecar Display
description: Connect your iPad over Sidecar and force it to extend instead of mirror, using BetterDisplay.
author: chiptoma

commands.name: connect-sidecar
commands.title: Connect Sidecar
commands.subtitle: Sidecar Display
commands.description: Connect the iPad and force the configured display mode.

commands.name: toggle-sidecar
commands.title: Toggle Sidecar
commands.subtitle: Sidecar Display
commands.description: Connect the iPad if detached, disconnect it if attached.

preferences.name: displayMode
preferences.title: Display Mode
preferences.description: How the iPad should sit in the arrangement once connected.

preferences.name: ipadName
preferences.title: iPad Name
preferences.description: Leave empty to auto-detect. Required only if you have more than one Sidecar device.

preferences.name: settleTimeoutSeconds
preferences.title: Settle Timeout
preferences.description: Seconds to wait for a display change to take effect. Clamped to 2-60.

scripts.test:hardware: npm run test:build && node test/safety.js && node test/e2e.js && node test/roundtrip.js
